message:
chore: formatting cleanups in dual_run and buffer, update audit index with batches 412-415

src/lab/dual_run.rs — Break long chained .saturating_add() call across
multiple lines for readability.

src/service/buffer.rs — Collapse let binding onto one line.

audit_index.jsonl — Record audit batches 412-415 (messaging compiler,
distributed recovery, morphism, concurrency limit, timeout, rate limit).
